# extract_multiscale_language { #natural_features.extract_multiscale_language }

```python
extract_multiscale_language(
    input_data,
    *,
    scales_s=(2.0, 4.0, 16.0),
    feature_families=None,
    provider_config=None,
    transcript_text=None,
    execution_mode=None,
    strict_dependency=None,
    aggregation='mean',
    window_policy='centered',
    standardize=True,
    add_intercept=False,
    as_dataframe=False,
    cache_dir='.nf_cache/language_embeddings',
)
```
